## Meeting Purpose

[Screening Brian Fogg for the Client Operations Manager role.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Role Mismatch:** The role is 100% ops (systems, processes, tools), but Brian's experience is too CS-focused.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [**Candidate Profile:** Brian's background is in CS/Creative Ops at ClearVoice (Fiverr) and Energybox.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [**Key Project:** At ClearVoice, he cut a 3-week onboarding to 30 mins to reduce churn, but the focus was on process refinement, not deep ops analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [**Outcome:** Andi ended the call early, confirming Brian is not a fit. They agreed to connect for future CS roles, potentially in Q2 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)

## Topics

### Role Definition: Client Operations Manager

  - [**Context:** Andi Bailey leads Customer Ops for a services-led marketing agency transitioning to a product org.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [**Need:** A partner to extend Andi's work, focusing entirely on the operational side of the delivery org.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [**Core Responsibilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
      - [Systems & processes](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
      - [Tools & access management](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
      - [Cross-team coordination](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [**Required Profile:** A CS background is helpful, but the role demands a strong ops/analysis focus.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)

### Candidate Profile: Brian Fogg

  - [**Background:** Mix of Customer Success and Creative Ops.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [**Experience:**](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
      - [**ClearVoice (Fiverr):** SaaS marketing platform.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
          - [Built CS ops from scratch → customer health scores, NPS surveys.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
          - [Identified extended onboarding as a churn driver.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
      - [**Energybox (Current):** Standardizing client ops across thousands of locations.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [**Motivation:** Return to the marketing/writing space.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)

### Project Example: Onboarding Optimization (ClearVoice)

  - [**Problem:** Extended onboarding periods directly correlated with higher churn.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [**Solution:** Cut a 3-week process to a single 30-min meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [**Method:**](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
      - [Surveyed customers to find pain points.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
      - [Eliminated internal "fluff" from the process.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
      - [Improved AE handoffs by requiring more pre-contract info.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [**Role:** Quarterbacked the project, coordinating AEs, editors, and talent managers.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

### Prioritization & Conflict Resolution

  - [**Prioritization Framework:** Solve problems with the largest, most sustainable impact first.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [**Conflict Example (Energybox):**](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
      - [**Problem:** A recurring customer request exceeded the product team's bandwidth.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
      - [**Solution:** Break the request into smaller, achievable goals (e.g., add a widget, pilot a report) to maintain momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [**Gaining Buy-in:** Explain objectives and rationale clearly to secure team alignment on new processes.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)

### Outcome: Role Mismatch

  - [**Decision:** Andi ended the call early, concluding Brian is not a fit.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [**Reason:** The role is 100% ops, requiring a stronger data/analytics focus than Brian's CS-heavy experience provides.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [**Future CS Role:** Andi will contact Brian for potential CS roles, likely opening in Q2 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [**Referral:** Brian offered to refer his former manager from ClearVoice.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andi:** Contact Brian for future CS roles, potentially in Q2 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [**Brian:** Provide referral for former manager at ClearVoice.](https://fathom.video/share/1WKyWjwvPgNMkszGpVuq_69PkpysYmC7?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
